features.label: Replace Mode
features.desc: Pattern + replacement string → replaced output. Supports $1, $2 backreferences.

features.label: Named Capture Groups
features.desc: (?<name>...) syntax fully supported. Named groups shown in a separate table.

features.label: Match Details Table
features.desc: Every match with index, length, value, line number, and all capture groups.

features.label: Pattern Library
features.desc: 22 pre-built patterns: Email, URL, Phone, IP, Date, UUID, Hex Color, Credit Card, HTML Tag, Password, and more.

features.label: Regex Explainer
features.desc: Token-by-token breakdown of any pattern in plain English.

features.label: Multi-line Tester
features.desc: Test each line independently. Green/red per line with match count.

features.label: Split Mode
features.desc: Split a string by the regex pattern. Shows all parts with index numbers.

features.label: Code Generator
features.desc: Generates ready-to-use regex code in 6 languages: JavaScript, Python, Java, Go, PHP, Rust.

features.label: Test Cases
features.desc: Add multiple test strings with expected outcome. Run all → PASS/FAIL per case.

features.label: Saved Patterns
features.desc: Save frequently used patterns with names. Persists in localStorage.

features.label: u and y Flags
features.desc: Added Unicode (u) and Sticky (y) flags alongside g/i/m/s.

features.label: Character Class Helper
features.desc: 20 clickable buttons for \d, \w, \s, \b, lookaheads, lookbehinds, named groups etc.
